programs.title: Kindig Customs
programs.desc: Dave Kindig runs the Kindig-It Design workshop.It designs, builds and modifies various vehicles for demanding customers.Creates unique machines.

programs.title: Garage Rehab
programs.desc: Richard Rawlings found success running the Gas Monkey Garage and the Gas Monkey Bar and Grill.In the new program, he helps other business owners.He gives them tips on what to do to be as successful as he was.For this purpose, he sets off on a journey across the United States and visits subsequent motorcycle and car repair shops that remain in poor financial condition.Richard and his team will diagnose their problems and tell them what needs to be improved to make their company perform better.

programs.title: Garage Rehab
programs.desc: Richard Rawlings found success running the Gas Monkey Garage and the Gas Monkey Bar and Grill.In the new program, he helps other business owners.He gives them tips on what to do to be as successful as he was.For this purpose, he sets off on a journey across the United States and visits subsequent motorcycle and car repair shops that remain in poor financial condition.Richard and his team will diagnose their problems and tell them what needs to be improved to make their company perform better.

programs.title: Megatransporty 2
programs.desc: The team from Szydłowiec transporting twelve modular houses from Bielsk Podlaski to Gdańsk still has 170 kilometers ahead of them, having to overcome tight roundabouts before entering a two-lane road.Meanwhile, a team from Zamość is heading to Warsaw to transport six metro cars to Mińsk Mazowiecki, each 27 meters long, 3 meters wide and 4.4 meters high, weighing 30 tons.The team from Barlinek is preparing for a night route with elements of the drilling platform to Police, but they encounter problems - the car blocks the exit, which forces Daniel to visit the police station.

programs.title: Tunnelbanan 8
programs.desc: Security guards and staff ensure the safety and smooth operation of the Stockholm Metro.They catch thieves and help passengers in trouble.

programs.title: Bodyguard elite
programs.desc: Behind the scenes of security guards' work - from training to field tasks.One of the best schools for bodyguards in the world is the European Academy of Bodyguards.Its training center is located near Poznań.
